description_long: This is a two-story pub building with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a weathered white facade on the front with large windows and a central entrance. The front signage reads 'House of Wolf', and the ground floor has a traditional pub frontage with a recessed doorway and awning. The side and rear walls are constructed of exposed brick, showing signs of age and urban wear, with various utility fixtures and a small service alley visible. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, while the side and rear have a more irregular window pattern, some of which are bricked up or partially obscured. The roof is flat and appears to be unfinished or in disrepair, with some rooftop elements visible. The building sits on a paved sidewalk, with no visible outdoor seating or decorative landscaping.
description: A two-story, weathered pub called 'House of Wolf' with a white front facade, exposed brick sides, and a flat roof, featuring large front windows and a central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white facade, large windows, central entrance, and pub signage above the door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a mostly blank, exposed brick wall with minimal features and some rooftop elements.
description_view_2: Rear alley view revealing utility fixtures, a service area, and irregular window placements on a brick wall.
description_view_3: Right side view with the 'House of Wolf' signage painted on the upper wall, multiple windows, and a long brick wall extending from the main structure.
attribute_signage: Painted wall-mounted signage on the upper right front facade, reading 'House of Wolf' in large, bold, sans-serif letters. The sign is rectangular, white with faded black text, and spans the width of the upper facade.
attribute_entrance_design: One main entrance located centrally on the front facade, featuring a single recessed door with a glass panel, flanked by large display windows. The entrance is framed by a dark awning and decorative trim, with a step up from the sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large rectangular windows on the front facade, symmetrically placed on both floors. The side and rear walls have a mix of small and medium-sized windows, some bricked up or partially obscured, with irregular spacing.
attribute_architectural_style: Victorian commercial with utilitarian features, characterized by the flat roof, symmetrical front windows, painted signage, and exposed brickwork on the sides and rear.
